endpoints.name: Make Statement Credit Offer Available Redeemable
endpoints.description: This resource is used to make a statement credit offer available for redemption.

endpoints.name: Returns Matched Offers
endpoints.description: This resource returns offers that are available to the user and conform to the search criteria (if specified).

endpoints.name: Returns Information on an Offer
endpoints.description: This resource returns extended information for the requested offer, typically used to display a detail view.

endpoints.name: Returns Redeemed Offers
endpoints.description: This resource returns offers that have been fulfilled by the user.

endpoints.name: Returns Information About Redeemable Postpaid Credit Offer
endpoints.description: This resource returns extended information about the specified activated postpaid credit offer.

endpoints.name: Provide User Feedback on Offer
endpoints.description: This resource allows a user to provide a thumbs-up or a thumbs-down rating of the specified offer. Offer matches that are disliked will be supressed from the results of future calls to Matched Offers.

endpoints.name: Returns Savings for the User
endpoints.description: This resource returns the accumulated and potential savings for a Personalized Offers user.

endpoints.name: Returns User Session Token
endpoints.description: This resource creates the user session. It must be called prior to any other API calls for the specified user. The Token value does not expire.
